Introduction Setup Limits

Developer guide for streaming translation

This guide explains how to configure a translation provider, keep request batches small, and retry failed paragraphs without losing the original document structure.

Setup

Use a stable model name and verify that the service endpoint accepts browser extension requests before enabling automatic translation.

const response = await fetch('/v1/chat/completions', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: { 'content-type': 'application/json' },
  body: JSON.stringify({ model: 'local-model', messages })
});

Operational limits

Large manuals should be translated chapter by chapter so readers can review terminology and formatting before exporting the final bilingual document.

Keyboard shortcuts such as Ctrl + Shift + T must remain readable and should not be sent to the translation provider.
